summary: Comprehensive E2E testing completed for İbed yatak kataloğu website. Both backend APIs and frontend UI testing achieved 100% success rate with zero critical issues.
passed_tests: All 7 products seeded successfully (4 yatak, 3 baza)
Product listing with category filtering functional
Contact form submission with backend integration working
API validation and error handling (404, 422) working
Homepage hero section and featured products displaying
Navigation between all pages (Ana Sayfa, Ürünler, Hakkımızda, İletişim) working
Category filtering (Yatak/Baza) functional with URL parameters
Product detail page navigation and back button working
Contact form frontend submission with success message display
About page content (stats and values) loading correctly
Responsive design working on mobile (390x844), tablet (768x1024), and desktop (1920x1080)
Dark navy theme (#020617) and turquoise (#4ecdc4) color scheme perfectly implemented
Framer Motion animations working (10+ animated elements)
Complete user journey: Home → Products → Product Detail → Contact working
Footer contact information correctly displayed (0352 321 17 55, Kayseri OSB address)
Turkish language content properly displayed throughout
